title: Return Length of Arguments Passed
titleCn: 返回传递的参数的长度

testcases.input: args = [5] Output: 1 Explanation: argumentsLength(5); // 1 One value was passed to the function so it should return 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: argumentsLength(5); // 1 One value was passed to the function so it should return 1.

testcases.input: args = [{}, null, "3"] Output: 3 Explanation: argumentsLength({}, null, "3"); // 3 Three values were passed to the function so it should return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: argumentsLength({}, null, "3"); // 3 Three values were passed to the function so it should return 3.
